message.content:
@startuml
actor 管理员 as admin
participant "教师管理" as teacherMgr
box "" #LightBlue
    participant "控制层\n---\n" as controlLayer
end box
package "" {
    participant "业务层\n---\n" as businessLayer
}
database "持久层\n---\n" as persistenceLayer

admin -> teacherMgr :添加请求
teacherMgr --> controlLayer :输入相关信息，添加请求
controlLayer --> businessLayer :相关信息，请求登录
businessLayer --> persistenceLayer :相关信息，添加请求
persistenceLayer <- persistenceLayer :根据相关信息添加
return 
businessLayer <-- persistenceLayer :返回添加对象
controlLayer <-- businessLayer :返回添加对象
teacherMgr <-- controlLayer :添加成功


@enduml
